lexical_matching: In the given context, "非审稿人的作者" translates to "Author not serving as a reviewer." It's essential to distinguish between authors and reviewers in academic conferences, as it helps maintain objectivity and fairness during the peer-review process.
semantic_matching:

1. "An author who is not a referee belongs to the class of authors." - This can be understood as saying that any entity that is an author but not a referee also falls under the category of authors.

2. In other words, an author cannot be a referee or a member of the Program Committee at the same time.
